name: Benchmark Registry Pattern (7 methods, 2 scorers)
applicability: Pluggable registry for comparing multiple implementations against same dataset with independent scoring. Directly applicable to comparing SoNash analysis skills or extraction approaches.
home_connection: T28 Content Analysis System quality measurement, skill comparison methodology

name: 3-Stage Document Pipeline (Extract/Transform/Render)
applicability: Clean separation: providers extract, processors transform, renderers output. Each stage independently extensible. Pattern for structuring any multi-stage content pipeline.
home_connection: Content analysis pipeline design, /analyze skill architecture

name: ConfigParser Introspection
applicability: Auto-discovers available components by inspecting module structure. Self-documenting config. Pattern for skill/agent discovery.

name: Session-Scoped Test Fixtures for ML Models
applicability: Load expensive ML models once per test session. Custom pytest markers for test parameterization. Pattern for expensive resource management in tests.

name: GPU-Enforced CI
applicability: Tests run on t4_gpu runners. Expensive = strict enforcement. Pattern for ensuring tests run in production-like environment.

name: Block Type Registry with Dynamic Class Loading
applicability: Maps enum to class via importlib lazy loading. Override system for custom block types. Pattern for extensible type systems.

name: LLM Service Abstraction (6 providers)
applicability: BaseService with 6 implementations (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI, Azure, Ollama, Vertex). Pattern for multi-LLM support. SoNash uses single provider.

name: Modal Serverless Deployment
applicability: Serverless deployment pattern for GPU-intensive workloads. Not directly applicable.
